---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
<!-- What problem or limitation are you trying to solve? -->
<!-- Example: "I have to manually run two commands every time because..." -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as possible. -->

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- Have you considered any alternative approaches? Why do they fall short? -->

## Use Case
<!-- Who benefits from this feature, and in what scenario? -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Any mockups, links, or references that support your idea. -->

---

**Contribution:** Are you willing to submit a PR for this feature?
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to implement this
- [ ] I can help review / test
- [ ] No, just suggesting
